programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When Donna speaks her mind one too many times for Ceaser's liking, he sends her packing. A customer appreciation (aka mixxxy) field trip to a water park ends in fireworks when Sky finds out that Ted has been messing around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of Puma's devastating loss of Ink 124, Ceaser meets with Med, who gives him the offer of a lifetime. Now, Ceaser finds himself torn between his inevitable and dreaded move to North Carolina, and the chance to run Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser finds himself looking for a house in North Carolina. Daddy Rick fires up the grill for some good old Southern hospitality, and for Ceaser, the pressure is on. Back in Harlem, Sky checks in with Puma and tells him to man up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After turning down a dream offer, Ceaser questions the person he is becoming. Sky talks to a friend and figures out a way to find closure with a heartbreaking piece of her past. Dutchess is shocked when Ceaser asks for a prenup. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna is finally given her shot at tattooing but struggles with her emotions over devastating news. Shit's new fling, Blue, comes in with a little stick that holds big news and has O S**t thinking about his future. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew throws down for a mixxxy party, and when a shocking video is played, Kathie loses it. Puma reveals some big news to Quani and asks her to come home to New York. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Reinas de Manhattan
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una reina drag en un parque local. Erin reabre un caso de drogas tras ser secuestrada por la madre del acusado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Secretos abiertos
programme.desc: La investigación del secuestro de una joven trae recuerdos dolorosos a Danny, quien trabajó en un caso similar sin resolver hace años.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Palabras que hieren
programme.desc: Danny busca a una mujer que amenaza con suicidarse junto al responsable de la muerte de sus padres. Frank acompaña a su nieto en una excursión escolar y lucha por conectar.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC implementa una estrategia elaborada para tratar de acabar con el anillo de sicarios “Los doce sucios”, con Reid jugando un papel central.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran cuerpos en lugares públicos alrededor de Boston, el UAC investiga si un taxi o servicio de transporte que las víctimas utilizaron antes de su muerte podría guiar hasta el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: París
programme.desc: Cuando la testigo estrella del gobierno en un caso de malversación es objetivo de un asesino, depende del equipo ayudarla a llegar a casa con vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Farsa
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra en una carrera contrarreloj cuando un grupo terrorista amenaza con detonar una bomba radioactiva en la zona de Washington.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Navaja
programme.desc: Cuando un marine es encontrado muerto, Gibbs, Fornell y el equipo se dirigen a la carretera para detener una operación ilegal de camiones.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los derribamientos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el ataque a una embarazada víctima de un juego de pandilleros que golpean a civiles al azar. Mientras, Frank duda en promover a un oficial por temor a ser visto como favoritismo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Enmiendas
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una mujer que recibió una dosis letal de lidocaína durante una cirugía plástica secreta. Mientras, Frank asigna a Jamie un caso frío y Erin prueba el "speed dating".

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in New Jersey is arrested for possession. A couple is pulled over while driving around a known drug zone looking to score and the boyfriend is arrested for an outstanding warrant. A routine traffic stop turns into a fruitful drug bust.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: There police arrest a bicycling drug dealer and his female client. Police respond to a call of an unhinged Rottweiler. Officers arrest an inebriated man after they spot him grabbing a female bystander.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: While attempting to break up a fight between two women an officer is attacked by one of the brawler’s boyfriends. Officers confiscate a negligible amount of marijuana from a man during a routine traffic stop. A man is arrested for domestic abuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is questioned for assaulting a woman on a train. A man is arrested for burglarizing a casino, he initially denies the charges but surveillance footage corroborates. A father kicks his son out of the house after his drinking becomes problematic.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several units are in pursuit of a stolen vehicle. A man is found unconscious behind the wheel of a car after he crashed into a tree. Officers intervene in domestic dispute between a stripper and her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisits one of the very first cases she worked as a CSI when the convicted felon in the murder claims the verdict was based on faulty evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An unexplained illness that is affecting random citizens of Las Vegas baffles the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A brutal motorcycle gang murder takes place in a biker bar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A cache of missing chips from a closed down casino turn up in Vegas and a string of murders follow, leading Langston to use deadly force for the first time in his career as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Sara unexpectedly returns, the CSI team come together to investigate the death of a famous young actress killed in a dubious traffic collision.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a porn producer and drug dealer are found dead in an upscale Vegas area, the CSIs focus their investigation on members of the neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When two office mates plot to rob a casino, their plan ends with the CSIs investigating a murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a policeman kills another officer, the CSIs must look to the evidence to determine if the shooting was premeditated or an accident.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An entire college football team comes under investigation when their beloved coach is found murdered in his home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two seemingly unrelated crimes tracked by the CSIs turn out to be connected by a twisted plot of revenge.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston continues to search for a young girl taken hostage as part of a human trafficking operation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An unusual piece of evidence revealed during a bowling tournament brings the CSIs to intestigate a murder at a bowling alley.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Nick, Greg and Hodges take Henry to celebrate his birthday at a biker bar, they uncover a double homicide and find several suspects still at the bar who may be the murderers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A major shootout at a gun store may be connected to the death of a young woman involved in a suicide pact.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato a bordo de un avión que acaba de aterrizar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen es llamado para investigar un choque de autos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos, cada uno de los cuales podría ayudar a resolver el otro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una joven de 16 años que está ligada a un burdel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga los asesinatos de un imitador de Elvis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una seguidora de estrellas de rock and roll.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un caso de personas extraviadas que involucra a toda una familia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un ataque a la estación de policía se convierte en una crisis de rehenes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga a un asesino canibal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga un asesinato con implicaciones cibernéticas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un crimen actual que está ligado a un robo de la mafia ocurrido hace 25 años.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Finlay tiene que lidiar con una bomba puesta en su coche, mientras que Russell recibe una llamada de alguien que afirma ser el asesino de Gig Harbor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI está investigando un robo y un tiroteo mortal en una tienda de marihuana terapéutica.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara y Greg son puestos en cuarentena después de encontrarse en la escena de un crimen que está contaminado con un patógeno mortal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped and the CSIs' only witness is a blind man, who heard the abduction, leading Horatio to an old nemesis.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the killer of Horatio's wife busts out of prison and goes on a rampage, they must determine what he's after and find him before he strikes again.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a reality star is murdered, the CSIs investigate the cast, the obsessed fans, and the stars' hidden pasts to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man claims to have dreamed of a murder before it happened, Horatio must send Natalia undercover for the team to determine the truth.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a sugar refinery explodes, Horatio Caine and the CSI team make a shocking discovery about one of the factory's employees.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a fisherman narrowly escapes death, the CSI team has to dodge bullets to keep him alive and find out who's after him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman is assaulted, Horatio and the team fight for her and her baby's life while tracking down her attacker.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the investigation of a dead millionaire leads the CSIs to an elite dating service, Ryan poses as a businessman to expose the matchmaker's lies.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a fire hydrant washes away all the evidence at a crime scene, the CSIs must recreate a very bizarre double murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder at a roller derby match, the only thing shorter than the girls' skirts are their tempers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami is ablaze with crime and chaos when Memmo Fiero, Horatio Caine's wife's killer, returns to take control of the city.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team try to figure out which of the nerds took revenge when a high school bully is stoned to death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a woman narrowly escapes death at the hands of a serial killer, Horatio will do anything to track down the psychopath.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover an exclusive hunting club where the prey is human, the most dangerous game of all.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Una noche de citas rápidas para los solteros de Miami se vuelve mortal para un machote de South Beach que está en el extremo equivocado del carro.

programme.desc: Un grupo de trabajadores rebeldes del campamento maderero de la selva mexicana se insurrecciona ante condiciones inhumanas de trabajo. Luchan por justicia y mejores condiciones, desafiando la opresión en búsqueda de dignidad y derechos laborales.

programme.title: Rosauro Castro
programme.desc: García Mata, funcionario del gobierno, viaja a un pequeño pueblo mexicano para investigar el asesinato de Cardozo, candidato a la alcaldía y enemigo del "Cacique" Rosauro Castro, quien gobierna con mano de hierro.

programme.title: El bruto
programme.desc: El dueño de un edificio planea desalojar a sus inquilinos para venderlo. Ante la resistencia de los afectados, y con la ayuda de su amante, contrata a un matón para que se encargue de los desalojos de manera violenta.

programme.title: Temple de acero
programme.desc: Una obstinada joven (Kim Darby) contrata al cascarrabias Rooster para buscar al hombre que asesinó a su padre y huyó con los ahorros familiares.

programme.title: Knock knock: seducción fatal
programme.desc: El gesto amable de un hombre de familia (Keanu Reeves) se convierte en una peligrosa seducción y el juego mortal del gato y el ratón cuando les abre la puerta a dos desamparadas jovencitas.

programme.title: Un plan sencillo
programme.desc: Dos hermanos encuentran cuatro millones de dólares en una avioneta caída e intentan quedarse con el dinero, pero la paranoia, la codicia y el miedo a ser capturado hacen que su plan esté fuera de control, con consecuencias desastrosas.

programme.title: La acusación de Rachel
programme.desc: Inspirado en una historia real. Una madre protege a su hijastra después de que la adolescente presencie el asesinato de su mejor amiga, pero pronto se ve obligada a enfrentarse a la aterradora posibilidad de que su hijastra sea la verdadera asesina.

programme.title: Find Me Guilty
programme.desc: Basada en la historia del gángster Jackie DiNorscio (Vin Diesel, 'Furious 7'), quien se representó a sí mismo en el juicio penal más largo de la historia de Estados Unidos. Con Peter Dinklage.

programme.title: Jugadores
programme.desc: Los ganadores del Óscar, Matt Damon y Edward Norton, protagonizan Rounders. Un exadicto a las apuestas regresa a las mesas en una apuesta de vida o muerte para rescatar a su amigo.

programme.title: El escritor fantasma
programme.desc: El cineasta Roman Polanski eleva la tensión en este thriller sobre un escritor (Ewan McGregor) encargado de redactar las vivencias de un ex primer ministro (Pierce Brosnan).

programme.title: Beowulf, la leyenda
programme.desc: En la era de los héroes llega el guerrero más grande, Beowulf. Tras destruir al poderoso demonio Grendel, se desata la interminable ira de su madre, una bestia despiadada y seductora que hará todo para asegurar su venganza

programme.title: El álamo
programme.desc: John Wayne y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta espectacular película histórica sobre el ataque de las tropas mexicanas en el in Álamo.

programme.title: El último castillo
programme.desc: Sus servicios al país lo hicieron un héroe pero un error lo convirtió en prisionero. Para el General Eugene Irwin (Robert Redford) es solo cuestión de cumplir su sentencia, hasta que descubre que otros presos están siendo asesinados.

programme.title: Confessions Of A Dangerous Mind
programme.desc: Mientras el inconformista creador de los programas de juegos favoritos de EE. UU. gana notoriedad por sus éxitos, se ve atraído al mundo de las operaciones encubiertas del gobierno. George Clooney dirige esta historia más extraña que la ficción.

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: Un mafioso atrapa a dos ladrones de autos mientras le roban y les da una semana para conseguirle un Ferrari clásico. Si no, podrían perderlo todo.

programme.title: Resultado final
programme.desc: Después de que terroristas mortales secuestran a su sobrina en un partido de fútbol, un ex soldado con habilidades de combate letales (Dave Bautista) libra una guerra de un solo hombre para salvarla y evitar la destrucción masiva.

programme.title: Piratas de la isla del tesoro
programme.desc: La vida monótona de un posadero cambia repentinamente cuando consigue un mapa del tesoro. Recluta la ayuda de Long John Silver y su banda de piratas asesinos, y se ponen en marcha en busca de la maldita Isla Esqueleto.

programme.title: Respeto (2012)
programme.desc: Lucas comienza un romance con Jasmine sin saber que antes anduvo con Jacob, uno de sus amigos. Tras sentirse traicionado, Jacob delata a Lucas con el hermanastro de Jasmine y solo provoca la ira entre pandillas.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Peligro inminente
programme.desc: Cuando su mentor, el almirante James Greer, se enferma, Ryan es nombrado director en funciones de la CIA.

programme.title: El escuadrón anti-monstruos
programme.desc: Algunos niños forman un club especializado en monstruos, pero pronto consiguen más de lo que esperaban cuando Drácula se traslada a la Tierra, con el monstruo de Frankenstein, el hombre lobo, la momia y el Gill-man.

programme.title: Los Hermanos Grimm
programme.desc: En esta película visionaria, Will y Jake Grimm sorprenden a los pueblos con sus folclores creativos e ilusiones elaboradas, pero descubren que los personajes fantásticos y las situaciones emocionantes en sus amadas historias son reales.

programme.title: Motín a bordo
programme.desc: Un viaje idílico a Tahití enfrentará a la tripulación y su capitán, cuando tras encontrar un paraíso tropical y sexo ilimitado, el capitán decide zarpar y adentrar a su tripulación en un peligroso viaje alrededor del Cabo de Hornos.

programme.title: Teen Wolf 2 (De pelo en pecho 2)
programme.desc: Te esperan las más emocionante y divertidas aventuras junto al galán más apuesto de los Estados Unidos. Un joven adolescente que tiene muchos más problemas que los demás, ya que con la salida de cada luna llena, se convierte en un hombre lobo.

programme.title: El escuadrón anti-monstruos
programme.desc: Algunos niños forman un club especializado en monstruos, pero pronto consiguen más de lo que esperaban cuando Drácula se traslada a la Tierra, con el monstruo de Frankenstein, el hombre lobo, la momia y el Gill-man.

programme.title: Los Hermanos Grimm
programme.desc: En esta película visionaria, Will y Jake Grimm sorprenden a los pueblos con sus folclores creativos e ilusiones elaboradas, pero descubren que los personajes fantásticos y las situaciones emocionantes en sus amadas historias son reales.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: Un perro que ayudó a los soldados en Afganistán vuelve a los EUA, donde lo adopta la familia de su adiestrador tras sufrir una experiencia traumática.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Torrente 5
programme.desc: El policía corrupto sale de la cárcel en el 2018 para encontrar una España diferente a la que conocía.

programme.title: South Park: Más grande, más larga y sin censura
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny y Cartman ven una película prohibida para menores que les deforma sus frágiles cabezas. Sus padres no tardan en declarar la guerra a Canadá y los chicos son la última esperanza que tiene Estados Unidos para frenar el Armagedón.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: Visitantes
programme.desc: Espíritus malignos atormentan a una exitosa doctora (Kate del Castillo) y a su familia, haciendo que enloquezcan y desconfíen el uno del otro.

programme.title: 7 Soles
programme.desc: Un "pollero" contratado para cruzar a un grupo de indocumentados decide que éste será su último viaje para la organización. Los jefes sospechan de él y mandan a El Gavilán a vigilarlo. Los polleros se traicionan, perdiendo parte de su "carga" humana.

programme.title: Todo Incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Una Navidad real sobre hielo
programme.desc: Un príncipe llega al norte del estado de Nueva York para establecer una empresa y se enamora de una ex patinadora olímpica.

programme.desc: Un ejecutivo de publicidad trabajador se enamora de un consultor que es un príncipe disfrazado.

programme.desc: Un príncipe de Europa llega a Nueva York y se enamora del chef que está planeando su evento anual de Navidad.

programme.title: Una Navidad como príncipe y mendigo
programme.desc: Un informante secreto desaparece y un joven agente contrata a un doble para interpretar su papel.

programme.title: Una Navidad real sobre hielo
programme.desc: Un príncipe llega al norte del estado de Nueva York para establecer una empresa y se enamora de una ex patinadora olímpica.

programme.title: Un baile de realeza en Navidad
programme.desc: Una bailarina retirada que asiste a embajadores reales organiza El Cascanueces. Termina en el centro de un inesperado romance navideño.

programme.title: Una Navidad real
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo de publicidad trabajador se enamora de un consultor que es un príncipe disfrazado.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Final Girl
programme.desc: Veronica está entrenando para ser una asesina y un grupo de chicos que la llevan al bosque con intenciones de asesinarla a ella, se encuentran con esta sorpresa. Serán ellos su presa.

programme.title: El juego del duende
programme.desc: Después de que un grupo de ladrones es enviado a cazar leyendas urbanas, roban el oro de un duende, solo para descubrir que hay que pagar un alto precio.

programme.title: Freeway
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: Negra Navidad
programme.desc: Una reversión escalofriante de la clásica película de terror. Un maníaco fugitivo aterroriza a las jóvenes de una fraternidad en su propia casa en Nochebuena. ¿Quién sobrevivirá a la noche?

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: 150 muertos y 350 desaparecidos en la pequeña ciudad montañosa de Snowfield, Colorado. Y ese es tan solo el comienzo...

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Sioux City Sue
programme.desc: A talent scout searches for a cowboy singer to do the voice for a cartoon character happens upon Gene Autry, who reluctantly takes the job, not knowing he is to be the voice of an animated donkey!

programme.title: Geronimo
programme.desc: In 1883, Geronimo and his small group of Apache warriors, under constant attack from both U.S. and Mexican military forces, reluctantly surrender in exchange for food and land. But promises are broken, and the Apaches declare all-out war on the U.S.

programme.title: Cast A Long Shadow
programme.desc: Audie Murphy plays Matt, a troubled saddle tramp with a penchant for drinking. When he inherits a massive ranch, it leads him back into the arms of an old flame (Terry Moore), as well as into the fists some old rivals who would rather see him dead.

programme.title: The Brass Legend
programme.desc: When a sheriff arrests a notorious outlaw based on a boy's tip, he faces both public scorn and a dangerous gang intent on freeing their comrade. This Western showdown proves that a lawman's greatest test isn't his aim, but his character.

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Katharine Hepburn garnered an Oscar nomination as the "plain yet magnetically beautiful" tomboy rancher, with Burt Lancaster brilliantly cast in the role of the smooth-talking con man.

programme.title: The Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: A waning director revives his career after discovering a beautiful Spanish dancer and makes her into a Hollywood star. Ava Gardner, Humphrey Bogart and Edmond O’Brien star in this bitter tale of stardom won and wasted from Joseph L. Mankiewicz.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate

programme.desc: In their final screen performances, Clark Gable and Marilyn Monroe are at their luminous best as an aging cowboy and a disillusioned divorcee, each trying to adapt to new ways of life in John Huston's piercing classic. Montgomery Clift also stars.

programme.title: The Night of the Hunter

programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie swears Edith into secrecy when he begins attending night-school classes to qualify for a high school diploma in hopes of getting a promotion at work.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from work in a most unusual mood. She later confides in Edith that on the way to work, she had been attacked by a construction worker near a construction site.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Being her time of the month, Gloria is in a complete foul mood and gets into a big argument with Edith, lambasting her for letting Archie boss her around.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: A chance meeting with her ex-husband sparks an old flame in Vivian...and Maude adds fuel to the fire by unwittingly encouraging Viv to see Chuck along.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: What makes Maude tick? Fearing she's fallen out of love with Walter, Maude seeks counseling from a psychiatrist and, in a unique one-woman performance by series star Beatrice Arthur, pours out her innermost thoughts and memories.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter adds to the many practical jokes at Arthur's medical convention by posing as a doctor, a ruse that he is able to pull off until a handyman requires his emergency help.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Vivian returns from a spa that stresses meditation, yearning to be more open with Arthur. But she meets a wall of defiance when Arthur, flabbergasted at the news that he may have lost $18,000 to a shyster, refuses to tell her about his financial woes.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: How far should the Findlays go to sell Walter's appliance store? Maude is appalled to find that Walter has supplied a date for a rich investor who's coning to dinner.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is in for a bit of a shock when a package she thinks is a gift from her ex-husband turns out to be all that is left of him...literally, leaving her responsible for disposing of his ashes in a very particular manner.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The riotous race of the century pits Alex against Louie in a winner-take-all bet to see who can bring in the most receipts. Lecherous Louie uses every dirty trick in the book to make sure he wins his prize—an evening with Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine suddenly starts getting mysterious love letters. When she becomes intrigued by the poetic propositions, a couple of cabbies quickly claim responsibility, leaving Elaine with the hilarious task of discovering who is the amorous writer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie makes a horrible first impression on girlfriend Zena’s parents on Taxi. Louie’s romance with girlfriend Zena takes an outrageous twist when she brings him home to meet her parents.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies try to make Tony a family man when they convince him to adopt the adorably precocious eight-year-old boy named Brian whom he befriended.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)

programme.desc: Felix and Oscar decide to hold their own "decathlon" to determine who is in better physical condition.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix reveals how he destroyed his own marriage by trying to save Oscar's.

programme.title: The Odd Couple (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar share ownership of a new car, multiplying their differences.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie builds a race car for the soap box derby. Meanwhile, Steve is building a missile in a race against a competitor company.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: To earn extra money, Mike and Robbie get a job painting a fence for a neighbor who's fence and yard are in a state of disrepair. The better the fence looks, the more that other neighbors help to restore the yard.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie (Don Grady) tries to get a date with a classmate (Perri Sinclair), who does not seem to be interested. Robbie tries the approach his teacher, Mr. Wiley, uses in history class to get the students interested in what he is saying.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: A neighbor, Mr Pearson, wants to take a leisurely drive with his family. Beyond his control, the Douglas' join him and the drive is anything but relaxing.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: When Laura and Rob give Ritchie a birthday party, 63 screaming kids cause a ruckus at the Petrie house.

programme.desc: Rob consults a psychiatrist to determine whether a series of mysterious ailments are psychosomatic.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.desc: The Treasures of Tutankhamen exhibit arranged by sculptress Alicia Warren is targeted by thief Mic Chandler, who is quickly apprehended by McGarrett. McGarrett finds Chandler's record consists of only petty crimes.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett arranges the escape of a convict so that the man can gather information for McGarrett about an effort to organize the Chinese Mafia in Honolulu.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Danny Williams' passion was rekindled by his high school sweetheart Mellissa Cole, charged with shoplifting. Life is complicated when she is linked to a neurotic murderer sought by McGarrett.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While out on a fishing trip Barnaby and J.R. are asked to investigate the disappearance of a ranch hand after his girlfriend believes he met with foul play.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby suspects foul play following the accidental deaths of a judge and a doctor, who both received alleged phone calls just prior to their demise from a dead woman whom they both helped put into a mental institution years before.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: In order to clear an innocent man Barnaby races against time to find an escaped convict who's testimony can set him free. Also trying to find the same convict is a bounty hunter with a reputation for bringing his quarry in dead.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix must find the kidnapped daughter of a Palm Springs mobster.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A potential candidate for governor employs Interect to probe his background. He believes that if the detective agency can't find dirt on him, then his political opponents won't.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Bill Bixby plays an unsuccessful police officer candidate who turns vigilante to avenge an officer's death.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.desc: The one-armed man caught in a police dragnet brings Kimble and Gerard face-to-face.

programme.desc: Detectives Hunter and McCall must work individually to investigate the killing of a police officer after they are separated as partners by their new precinct leader.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A wealthy woman and her lover concoct an elaborate scheme to do in her husband.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno protects a deceased hit man's daughter and reveals the truth to her about her father's profession.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuatro caminos
programme.desc: Una mujer nativa americana fue brutalmente asesinada en el desierto de Nuevo México y la escena del crimen estaba llena de evidencia forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía sospecha del Dr. John Jack Boyle en la desaparición de su esposa, Noreen, cuando firma los papeles de la hipoteca de una nueva casa con una mujer que se hace pasar por su esposa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un disparo en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros. ¿Pero fue un homicidio o un suicidio? Se necesitaría la experiencia de expertos forenses y dos juicios con jurado para determinar el destino del asesino acusado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ocurre un accidente y los responsables se dan a la fuga, causando la muerte de un joven muy popular. Los investigadores se ven enfrentados con la tarea de buscar un barco entre otros 1200.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece sin dejar rastro. A pesar de que se sospecha de un juego sucio, las pistas no funcionan y la investigación se estanca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Shamaia Smith desaparece de un club de striptease en East Hartford, Connecticut. La policía considera varios patrones del club, pero se enfocan en un comerciante local, Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la respuesta de emergencia de Illinois atendió un incendio en un garaje y se encontró a un hombre aplastado debajo de un camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El Septiembre de 1984, en un suburbio de Tucson, Arizona, Vicki Hoskins, de ocho años, salió de su casa en su bicicleta rosada para enviar una carta a su madre. Ella nunca regresó, pero su bicicleta ligeramente dañada fue encontrada en las cercanías.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a Joann Katrinak muerta en un campo de maíz con su hijo pequeño, el sospechoso más obvio es el esposo y padre de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Impresiones fuertes
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de la Fuerza Aérea fue encontrada muerta en su cama con una bolsa plástica de lavandería cerca de su rostro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Camino fatal
programme.desc: Un patrullero de carreteras fue enviado a lo que pensó que sería un accidente de tráfico de rutina hasta que miró en el automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una peluquera joven y atractiva fue agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su propio salón de belleza. La evidencia en la escena del crimen no coincidió con ninguno de los sospechosos y, después de la investigación inicial, el caso se archivó por diez años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Valiree Jackson, de 9 años, desapareció camino a la escuela cerca de Spokane. Su padre, Brad Jackson, denunció la desaparición y toda la comunidad comenzó a buscar a su secuestrador.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mundo es un escenario
programme.desc: La policía es enviada a la escena de un tiroteo y descubren que el esposo de la víctima es uno de los suyos: un detective de homicidios que dice que su esposa se disparó accidentalmente en la cabeza.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Tensions run high for the 69 new girls as the 18 returning DCC veterans join the competition for a coveted invitation to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A wife and mother survives an attack in her home and a shot to the head; authorities search for a motive.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When police are unable to identify a young murder victim, a dogged investigator employs the help of armchair detectives and new DNA technology to find her killer -- and her identity.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A microscopic clue and a stroke of luck help authorities solve the murder of a young woman that took place inside her Jacksonville Beach, Fla., home.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A girl's recovery from a gunshot wound inspires the community to get her justice.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Ohio mother Heather Bogle goes missing, a detective identifies multiple suspects, until he himself comes under scrutiny for his investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The disappearance of two teenagers brings together two families in a common journey for justice; what California is doing to prevent a similar tragedy.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After being severely beaten in her own home, a high school girl goes under hypnosis to try to identify her attacker.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a University of Utah athlete is found murdered on campus, investigators learn that she had reached out to the campus police for help multiple times before her death.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Rock of Love: Mudbowl III
programme.desc: It's Pink Bus vs. Blue Bus in the muddiest of Mudbowls yet! Bret flies away with the MVP for an intimate overnight trip.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Truck Stop Games
programme.desc: In a wacky competition based on beer, babes and truckers, one team will try anything to sway the judges.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bikini Day Care
programme.desc: The tour hits Panama City Beach, Florida. Seven girls show their mothering skills by taking care of a gaggle of rowdy youngsters at the pool.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Exes and Ohs!
programme.desc: Secrets come out when Bret invites his ex-girlfriend Ambre and Rock of Love alum Heather to interrogate the remaining six girl's exes.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Duet To Me One More Time
programme.desc: Four girls are challenged to write lyrics to one of Bret's songs and sing with him.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Double Dates
programme.desc: Bret plans a couple of fantasy dates for his last three girls, but when one girl gets to go twice, the other two are worried that Bret has already made his final decision.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bret’s Rock of Love III
programme.desc: Bret takes his final two girls to the Dominican Republic to spend some quality, romantic time with each one before making his final choice.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Rock of Love Girls Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: What the hell happened to all those girls? From actress to artist, scholar to show girl, prom queen to porn star, they've all gone on to bigger and better things.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Sumthin's Stinkin' in the House of Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 new women to his mansion with the hope of finding someone “real” this time around.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav is Blind
programme.desc: Flavor Flav challenges his remaining fourteen Flavorettes to a blind speed dating competition (to get to know them without the influence of “physicality-ness”).

programme.title: Flavor of Love: She Works Hard for Her Honey
programme.desc: Twelve girls are left and jealousy is running rampant. Flav divides the girls into groups of six and presents them with two challenges.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Jelly on the Telly
programme.desc: Flavor Flav wants a girl who knows how to move.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Famous Friends and Strangeness
programme.desc: Flavor Flav knows everyone who's anyone in the hip hop industry and today he wants to have them all over to his house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Who Loves New York? (Photo Shoot To The Death)
programme.desc: Just like last season, Flav has invited a special guest from his past to help give him input on his selection of ladies.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The end of another school year finds Darcy’s faith – in her boyfriend – being put to the test. When she discovers that Spinner has a past, Darcy grapples with a harsh reality of teen romance: jealousy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Peter receives a new car for his birthday, he quickly becomes a frequent face in the street racing scene.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things heat up between Emma and Sean – and when she takes time off from Peter to consider her relationship with Sean, Peter takes action – and Sean winds up expelled from Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma is happy that the racing debacle is behind them, and that Peter is finally free if you don’t count the house arrest and five hundred hours of community service.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy starts the year off with big plans, coaching the girl’s junior basketball team and he is determined to take his relationship with Ashley to the next level. But can Jimmy handle the realities of his sexual future?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: A US law has been passed forcing the return of ethnic artefacts and ancestral remains to native communities.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: In 2000, scientists made a groundbreaking discovery, explaining how birds evolved from dinosaurs. However, a deeper investigation put a question mark over everything.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to repair the TARDIS so that he can come to Romana's rescue.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana suspect that the Nimon are a small part of a large invasion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: On Crinoth, Romana discovers the truth behind the Nimon's empty promises.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana visit the Leisure Hive, a tourist attraction on the planet Argolis.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana track down the cause of the mysterious deaths at the Leisure Hive.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Tachyon Recreation Generator ages the Doctor into a white haired old man.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The obsessed Pangol is determined to give Argolis a future and strike back at the Foamasi.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Arriving on Earth, the Doctor, Harry and Sarah meet a group of stranded human colonists.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah has been captured by Styre who is conducting experiments on the captured humans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands on the old Dalek homeworld of Skaro.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Romana is captured and interrogated by the Daleks whilst the Doctor meets the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Davros has awoken from his centuries long slumber and is taken prisoner by the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that the Daleks need Davros to break the stalemate in their war with the Movellans.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah finds a mysterious fossilized hand, which re-grows and begins to move.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The hand builds power and reacts to nuclear radiation, causing an overload situation.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The fossilized hand has regenerated into a Kastrian called Eldrad who appears to be female.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor, Sarah and Harry return to Nerva, but at an earlier point in time.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Sarah is the latest victim of the space plague.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Cybermen who are intent on destroying Voga.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The truth of Adrasta's scheme is revealed but a terrible retribution is already in motion.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes the the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A close-knit community on Moorpar in California finds itself endangered by a collection of mischievous dogs, including three huskies.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Wheaten terrier puppy bites when playing; a Jack Russell terrier jumps when the garbage disposal runs and lunges at the dishwasher; a Lab fears shiny floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar teams up with horse whisperer Pat Parelli to improve the behavior of the dogs and horses at a riding center; a schnauzer/poodle mix with separation anxiety and dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Old and new cases that show the process for adopting a dog, introducing one to the home, setting rules and boundaries and dealing with the loss of a pet.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward people and dogs; a dachshund mix exhibits aggression at feeding time and when it comes time to trim his nails.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan investigates the case of a bulldog named Bella who has become aggressive ever since her owner's five-month rehab stint.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. So Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: To his traditional bounty hunting tools of confidential informants, canvassing, and silver-tongued subterfuge, the world's greatest bounty hunter has added Facebook! A word to the wise for those on the run-post at your own peril, the Dog is watching!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog likes to say, "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree," and this is a hunt where that is true. So will Dog be able to use one family member's troubled ways to catch another one in trouble with the law?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two different young men both have a bad habit of missing their court dates. Looking over their files, Dog senses that they have another trait in common, both are a little too tied to their mothers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today has a history of violence, and apparently plans to re-locate without notifying the proper authorities. Unfortunately the team is missing a key player, Duane Lee is MIA today, distracted by his new lady love.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Duane Lee can't agree about what role Duane Lee should have in the family business. But the family comes together as they set out to hunt a chronic violator with an open warrant and a wife who has an odd request for Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has dropped Duane Lee from the team. When Leland confronts Dog and Beth about the decision, tempers flare. But they have to come together to answer a cry for help from a mother who feels that the safest place for her daughter is jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School, and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different from the all-girls private school she attended.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This one is close to home. Dog's target on today's hunt is the cousin of Kali, Garry Boy's caregiver. In addition, she has a reputation as a brawler. With Duane Lee still missing from the team, Baby Lyssa decides she will step up in this hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In an attempt to bring the team back together, Dog recruits his pastor, Tim Storey, to be the peacemaker. As Dog begins his hunt for a young man who has trouble showing up at court, Tim has his own mission--convince Duane Lee to meet with him.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When can a bounty hunt also be a date? When Dog and Beth decide to ride in the same SUV as they pursue a runaway fugitive, will their different approaches to the investigation lead to a capture and romance?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on, the lame Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder, Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows, only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold, it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan, so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk holds the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince the family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target for today was once an upstanding member of his community. Now with no home, no job, and the law on his trail, this middle-aged exile from middle-class society is using the cold end of an ice pipe to soothe his troubled soul.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick reveals to his sister that Blake is responsible for the death of their younger brother; Sammy Jo and Steven spend the night together; Alexis shoots at Krystle's horse, causing her to be thrown to the ground and hospitalized.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle loses her baby; Steven and Sammy Jo begin dating, although Steven is in love with Claudia. Fallon continues her affair with Nick, and is jealous to find him visiting Krystle in the hospital.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon learns she is pregnant and tells Jeff she is having an abortion; he agrees to divorce her but only if she bears the child. Krystle remains despondent over the loss of her baby; Claudia takes a job with Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tricks Blake into coming to Rome and further traps him by hiring a gossip photographer to snap suggestive photos of the two; Jeff begs Fallon to cancel her abortion; as Nick confronts Krystle, his consolation gives way to passion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the paparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gives birth to a son; Alexis offers Sammy Jo $25,000 to leave Denver; Jeff and Claudia make love; Krystle accuses Alexis of killing her baby; Alexis learns Krystle and Blake are not legally married.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning he is not her true father, Fallon refuses to see Blake; Jeff falls in love with Claudia, who is caught stealing from Denver-Carrington; Fallon's baby undergoes emergency surgery; Claudia's husband and daughter are believed dead.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: A blood test proves that Blake is Fallon's true father; Steven travels to Hollywood in search of his wife; Claudia learns her husband and daughter are believed to be dead; as Krystle struggles with an armed Claudia, the gun discharges.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia is hospitalized after the shooting incident; Krystle is implicated. Logan Rhinewood continues to amass Devner-Carrington; Cecil proposes marriage to Alexis.
